title: App Settings - General - User stays logged in after restating the app
scenario: User session persists after app restart with passcode or Face ID prompt on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
Restart the app (force close and reopen).
Verify the user is still logged in.
expected: User should remain logged in after app restart. A passcode or Face ID prompt should appear depending on phone settings.
